issues.title: Codex — model `gpt-5-codex-alpha-2025-11-07` 404 Not Found at proxy (5-day pattern, 3 fails today)
issues.detail: 5-day codex pattern, error shape mutated again. Today's runs (Daily Cache Strategy Analyzer 26415323924, Smoke Codex 26420288281, Changeset Generator 26420288273) all failed with `unexpected status 404 Not Found: Model not found gpt-5-codex-alpha-2025-11-07, url: http://172.30.0.30:10000/responses`. aw_info.json reports model `gpt-5.3-codex` but the CLI (codex 0.133.0) sends `gpt-5-codex-alpha-2025-11-07`. The api-proxy doesn't know that alpha id. Root issue: codex CLI default model id has drifted ahead of what the proxy serves. Pin codex CLI to a known-good version or whitelist the alpha model at the proxy.

issues.title: Smoke Antigravity fails with `Cannot find module parse_antigravity_log.cjs` (NEW)
issues.detail: Run 26420288311 (1.7m) fails at conclusion step: `Unhandled error: Error: Cannot find module '/home/runner/work/_temp/gh-aw/actions/parse_antigravity_log.cjs'`. First Antigravity engine run we've audited and the conclusion-step parser isn't bundled. Harness build needs to include parse_antigravity_log.cjs alongside the existing parse_*.cjs siblings for other engines.

issues.title: Avenger still hits max_turns=25 on full agent runs (env-mismatch unresolved)
issues.detail: Run 26411624558 (21.4m, 26 turns, $1.05) hit `terminal_reason: max_turns` with the same Go 1.26.3 vs 1.24.13 + golangci-lint missing root cause as yesterday. 4 other Avenger runs today exited in 17-20s via skip-if-match. Yesterday's recommendation to pre-install Go/golangci-lint or bind-mount the toolcache PATH has NOT landed. $1.05 wasted today (down from $3.13 yesterday because fewer real runs).

issues.title: RESOLVED-OR-QUIET: No awf-squid unhealthy events today
issues.detail: Zero squid health failures observed across 174 runs. Pattern from yesterday (2 runs) not reproduced. De-escalate but keep watching.

issues.title: Daily Safe Output Tool Optimizer $6.05 — still top single-workflow cost
issues.detail: Run today cost $6.05 / ~8.6M tokens. Trend: $8.54 → $5.55 → ~$5 → $6.05 — leveling off rather than continuing down. Continues to lead workflow cost. Recommended next step: targeted prompt review (the prompt is the top-5 cost driver every day).

issues.title: Documentation Unbloat ~$3.55 / 24m — recurring high-cost workflow
issues.detail: Run 26411591957 (claude) ran 24.2m, ~4.4M tokens, $3.55. Also flagged 05-23 at $3.31. Now consistently in the top-3 cost slot. Worth a focused review.

issues.title: Firewall block rate climbed back to 17.9% (762/4268)
issues.detail: Up from 4% yesterday. Concentrated in Smoke workflows that intentionally test blocked domains: Smoke Copilot 59 blocks, Smoke Claude 29, Smoke Pi 20 (100% blocked = expected). Non-smoke workflows worth watching: Linter Miner 43, Daily Testify 31, Copilot Opt 36. Mostly noise from `(unknown)` and Google service domains.

issues.title: PR Sous Chef variance 7-65 turns (avg 21.3)
issues.detail: 5-day pattern. 7 runs today, no fatal failures, but cross-run template miner re-flagged the variance. Continues to look more PR-content-driven than prompt-driven.

issues.title: Deployment Incident Monitor — 1 real-run failure (19.1m)
issues.detail: 28 runs in 24h. 27 ran 1-2 seconds (skip-fast on deployment_status events with no real work). 1 ran the full agent (run 26411586422, 19.1m, copilot, claude-sonnet-4.6) and failed. Specific failure mode not yet drilled down. Watch tomorrow.

issues.title: RESOLVED-OR-QUIET: Smoke CI cancellation pattern
issues.detail: 17 Smoke CI runs today, 0 error_count. The 6-day cancellation pattern appears resolved. Keep watching weekly.

issues.title: RESOLVED: copilot harness ENOENT set_output bug
issues.detail: Day 3 with zero occurrences after copilot CLI 1.0.48→1.0.52 upgrade. Confirmed stable across 56 copilot runs today.

issues.title: RESOLVED: copilot anthropic-beta header CAPIError 400
issues.detail: Day 3 with zero occurrences. CLI 1.0.52 holds stable.
